full_text:
Xiahou Shang (Boren) 夏侯尚 (伯仁)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xiahou Shang (夏侯尚), styledBoren (伯仁). A close friend to Cao Pi and defended against Wu. Xiahou Shang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Xiahou Shang lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
